---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for this plugin
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: r1azmh
---

## Problem to Solve
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
e.g. "I find it frustrating when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? If so, describe them here.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples that would help explain your request.
